name: voices-foundation
description: Open-source local-first tooling for Indigenous language recording, consent, corpus validation, and teaching-model foundations.

scripts.check:js: node --check bin/voices-validate.mjs && node --check src/corpus/validate.mjs && node --check src/corpus/restrictions.mjs && node --check apps/intake-web/src/intake-state.mjs && node --check apps/intake-web/src/app.mjs
